name: pestto
description: Extensão minimalista para conversão automática de Markdown ao colar texto no WhatsApp Web.

scripts.build: rm -f $npm_package_config_zipName && zip -q $npm_package_config_zipName manifest.json src/content.js src/converter.js src/version.js src/icons/icon-16.png src/icons/icon-48.png src/icons/icon-128.png
scripts.version: node scripts/sync-version.js && conventional-changelog -p angular -i CHANGELOG.md -s && git add manifest.json CHANGELOG.md
scripts.undo-version: git tag -d $(git tag --points-at HEAD) && git reset --hard HEAD~1

author: axmbo
